title: Cheva
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=CIS |image= |name=Cheva |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=She/her |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Well, Cheva, when the lights go out, hang on to me and run like crazy, understand?''"
"''Yes''"
"''And if the captain or I shout drop, you drop down flat. Got that?''"
"''I can assure you I have.|Ghez Hokan to Cheva|}} '''Cheva''' was a [[Gender/Legends|Female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] biologist and part of [[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] [[Ovolot Qail Uthan]]'s team of [[Scientist/Legends|scientists]] who worked on a [[nanovirus]] made especially to decimate the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic's]] [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|clone army]]. She was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] [[Fi Skirata|Fi]] of [[Omega Squad]] using an [[E-Web heavy repeating blaster/Legends|E-Web]] blaster while trying to escape the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] base on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Qiilura/Legends|Qiilura]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Cheva }} [[Category:Biologists]] [[Category:Confederacy science and engineering personnel]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Individuals with she/her pronouns]]
